    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Book>
    BookDAO.getAllBookings()
    Retrieves a list of all current bookings in the database.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    BookDAO.createBooking(Book booking)
    Creates a new booking in the underlying database.
    boolean
    DBImplementationBook.createBooking(Book b)
    Creates a new booking using a stored procedure in the database.
    String
    BookDAO.updateBooking(Book oldBooking, Book newBooking)
    Updates an existing booking by replacing it with a new booking structure.
    String
    DBImplementationBook.updateBooking(Book oldBooking, Book newBooking)
    Updates an old booking by deleting it and creating a new one matching the updated details.
